name: ratchet
description: Intent-driven execution framework with ratchet optimization. Describe what you want, the system autonomously iterates until it produces the best result. Dual-track verification (agent runs 24/7, human reviews async). Works across domains: software, writing, research. Use this whenever someone describes a project they want to build, create, or accomplish — especially for non-trivial multi-step tasks.
author: Ethan
